positions.title: Web Chapter Lead
tasks: Defined role-to-skill expectations for hiring and interview calibration in the Web Chapter.
Established chapter lead responsibilities together with other chapter leads.
Kept chapter forum meetings on a steady monthly cadence and improved attendance.
Structured chapter documentation to make it easier for engineers and partner teams to navigate.
Drove knowledge-sharing initiatives across chapter members and adjacent teams.
Supported promotion input, mentoring, and on-boarding across multiple colleagues.

positions.title: Engineering Lead
tasks: Led technical discovery and migration strategy for the Zettle backoffice to PayPal, defining architecture and hiring the initial frontend team.
Established and owned the quality review process for 20+ third-party integrations on the Zettle Apps Marketplace.
Partnered with Product on roadmap shaping, prioritization, and strategic decision-making.
Defined and established the accounting integrations team operating model, clarifying ownership, stakeholder landscape, and the end-to-end integration lifecycle.
Drove modernization and technical debt reduction (micro-frontend migration, database upgrades, GitHub Actions adoption, backend AWS SSO migration).
Implemented SSO-based authentication for two external partners.
Represented the Accounting Integrations domain in cross-team initiatives (e.g., Refunds & Exchange), ensuring architectural alignment and mitigating impact on merchant workflows.

positions.title: Product Manager
tasks: Managed accounting integration initiatives and delivered Quickbooks in the US & UniEconomy in Norway.
Set roadmap and priorities based on user feedback, metrics, and company goals.
Coordinated internal and external stakeholders to move integration initiatives forward.

positions.title: Software Engineer (Web)
tasks: Contributed to the implementation of technical requirements for 3 different projects using React & Java/Kotlin
Collaborated with colleagues from other teams to insure a coherent UX across the entire company offering
Participated in on-call duties to keep our systems up and running

excerpt: I was involved in multiple client projects both on the front-end and the back-end wearing multiple hats

positions.title: Software Engineer

Implemented tools to help with the migration of the existing data from SQL Server to MySQL

tasks: Sporthome: Was responsible for finalizing work on a client project and guiding junior developers and code review.

tasks: Built a font-end application in AngularJS, for creating emails visually, without having to code it by hand
